subActions.value: Pull toward one of your allies.

actions.value: At the start of each of your turns, you may %game.element.consume.ice%. If you do, at the end of each of your forced movement abilities performed this turn, all enemies moved with the ability suffer %game.action.damage:1%
At the end of each of your turns, you may %game.elementHalf:ice|air%. Reduce all of your %game.action.push%, %game.action.pull%, and other forced movement effects by one.

bottomActions.value: Gain advantage on your next attack this round.

subActions.value: This summon is considered to be last in initiative order when determining monster focus.
